description_long: This is a robust, heavy-duty sledgehammer with a thick, rectangular metal head featuring two wide striking faces. The head is reinforced with two metal bands and rivets running across its width, and a prominent central knob or bolt is visible on the top. The handle is cylindrical, made of a material resembling aged or treated wood, and is equipped with two wide, ribbed grip sections for enhanced handling and slip resistance. The overall finish is matte and slightly rough, with a weathered, utilitarian appearance suitable for demanding tasks. The coloration is predominantly dark brown and gray, with metallic highlights on the head and rivets. No visible branding or decorative elements are present, emphasizing its functional, industrial design.
description: A heavy-duty sledgehammer with a rectangular metal head, reinforced bands, and a ribbed wooden handle for grip. The finish is matte and weathered, with metallic and dark brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular hammer head, the central knob, and both ribbed grip sections on the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the hammer head and the alignment of the central knob, with the handle's ribbed grips visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view nearly identical to the front, displaying the opposite striking face and the same handle features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the head's thickness and the handle's ribbed texture.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with two wide ribbed grip sections for enhanced hold; cylindrical and textured for slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of steel, featuring two flat striking faces, reinforced with two metal bands and a central knob or bolt on top.
